utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Now check the final package: 
1. destination – clearly specified as 'Lisbon, Portugal'. ✅
2. travel_dates – clearly specified as '2024-07-11 to 2024-07-16'. ✅
3. transportation – flight details present with airline, class, dates, baggage, cancellation policy, and total flight cost mentioned ('Included in total package (€1,655)'). ✅
4. accommodation – hotel name, rating, location, room type, amenities, rating all included, but cost not explicitly mentioned (only total package cost). ❌ (missing cost detail)
5. activities – listed (Golf Day, City Walking Tour, Fine Dining Experience) with duration, guide, equipment, difficulty, but no cost per activity. ❌ (missing costs)
6. additional_services – restaurant info, cuisine, dress code, dietary info, but no cost. ❌ (missing costs)
7. total_budget – total cost, currency, remaining budget, payment due date, cancellation deadline all included. ✅
Hence, 4 of 7 items are fully specified according to the format (destination, travel_dates, transportation, total_budget).
